description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a small dog with a playful and whimsical appearance. The toy features a light cream-colored body with darker brown patches on its face and ears, and it has a pair of large, upright white bunny ears with pink inner linings attached to its head. Its face is expressive, with large, round black eyes, a smiling mouth, and a pink tongue sticking out, giving it a cheerful and friendly demeanor. The toy sits on a round, flat brown base, and a small white tail is visible at the back. The surface texture appears soft and slightly fuzzy, typical of plush toys, and the seams and stitching are subtly visible. There is a small rectangular tag attached near the base, but no prominent branding is visible.
description: A plush dog stuffed toy with brown patches, large white bunny ears, and a cheerful face, sitting on a round brown base. The toy has a soft, fuzzy texture and a playful, friendly appearance.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the back of the head, bunny ears, and small white tail, with the brown base visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the smiling face, large eyes, pink tongue, and both bunny ears, with the front legs and base clearly visible.
description_view_2: Side view showing the dog's profile, one ear, the bunny ears, and the tongue sticking out, with the tag near the base visible.
description_view_3: Direct rear view focusing on the back of the head, bunny ears, and the small white tail, with the base and tag visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The stuffed toy has a smiling facial expression with large, round eyes and a pink tongue sticking out, giving it a cheerful and playful look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with front legs forward and head slightly tilted, ears perked up and tongue out.
